arts.ttl: Follow live: Liverpool face Girona at the Estadi Montilivi
arts.sum: Arne Slot's table-topping Liverpool side look to maintain their perfect record in the Champions League as they travel to face Girona on Matchday six

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand claims keeping Virgil van Dijk, Mo Salah AND Trent Alexander-Arnold would be 'monumental' for Liverpool - as Steve McManaman names the one star he expects to go
arts.sum: Captain Van Dijk, Alexander-Arnold and Salah are all potential departures from Anfield this summer, with less than six months left on their deals before they can leave as free agents.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate offers Liverpool injury update hours before Champions League match in Girona
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate suffered a knee injury in Liverpool's 2-0 win over Real Madrid last month

arts.ttl: Girona announce major injury setback ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Girona have on Tuesday evening announced an altogether considerable setback on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that attacker Bojan Miovski is set for an incoming…

arts.ttl: Alisson returns as Arne Slot names strong Liverpool line-up for Girona

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk uses just one word to describe Arsenal’s William Saliba as a player
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk and William Saliba are becoming serious rivals in the Premier League right now. Van Dijk and Saliba are constantly compared to one...

arts.ttl: Jürgen Klopp agent says Liverpool experience influenced Red Bull decision
arts.sum: Jürgen Klopp left Liverpool at the end of last season as a legend of the club. There was an awful lot of gratitude sent towards the German manager and not only was he successful on the pitch with the Reds but he also managed to strike up a relationship more generally as a human. Many The post Jürgen Klopp agent says Liverpool experience influenced Red Bull decision appeared first on Sport Witness.

On the eve of the game, Girona coach Míchel Sánchez was full of praise for his team’s opponents - a side who are quick to punish mistakes: “ Liverpool dominates every concept of the game from defence to attack, but if we give our best we will be in with chance because in football anything is possible. One of key areas is in transitions and Liverpool are the best team in the world at that .

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Alexis Mac Allister playing for Liverpool today against Girona in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Liverpool team news for Girona: Konaté, Jota, Chiesa... Following their 2-0 Champions League win over Real Madrid at Anfield, Liverpool travel to Girona looking to record their second successive victory over Spanish opposition on Tuesday and keep their perfect record in the league phase intact.

arts.ttl: Girona v Liverpool: Champions League – live
